name: Conveyor Belt with Part Sorting
description: Conveyor sorting system with three output lanes. Parts detected by I_PartSensor trigger a counter. When M_PartCount reaches 50, divert parts to Lane 2 via Q_DivertValve. Emergency stop I_EStop. Jam detection via I_JamSensor forces Fault state. Program: ConveyorSort

name: Pump Protection with Overload Latching
description: Centrifugal pump P-101 starts on I_Start, stops on I_Stop or I_Overload. If I_Overload trips more than 3 times, latch in Fault state. Manual reset via I_Reset. Timer T_StartDelay = 3 seconds before motor energised. Program: PumpProtect

name: Dual Tank Sequential Fill
description: Fill Tank A first via Q_ValveA until I_LevelHighA, then close Q_ValveA and open Q_ValveB to fill Tank B until I_LevelHighB. Overflow on either tank triggers I_OverflowA or I_OverflowB which forces Fault. E-Stop I_EStop highest priority. Program: DualTankFill

name: Star-Delta Motor Starter
description: Motor starter with star-delta switching. On I_Start, energise Q_StarContactor for T_StarDelay (5 seconds), then switch to Q_DeltaContactor. Thermal overload I_ThermalOverload and E-Stop I_EStop both force Fault state with Q_Alarm. Program: StarDeltaStart

name: Heater Zone Temperature Control
description: Heater zone control. Q_Heater energised when running. High temperature alarm I_TempHigh forces Fault state and de-energises Q_Heater. Thermal fault I_ThermalFault also triggers Fault. Startup delay T_PreHeat = 5 seconds. Manual reset I_Reset. Program: HeaterZone

name: HVAC Multi-Zone Fan Control
description: HVAC fan control for three zones. Fan Q_Fan runs when system is started. High temperature I_TempHigh or filter fault I_FilterFault triggers Fault state and stops Q_Fan. Status light Q_StatusRun indicates running. Alarm Q_Alarm on any fault. E-Stop I_EStop mandatory. Program: HVACZoneCtrl

name: Chemical Dosing with Interlock
description: Chemical dosing pump Q_DosePump only runs when I_AgitatorRunning feedback is TRUE and I_SafetyValveOpen is TRUE. Dose timer T_DoseTime = 30 seconds. If interlock drops during dosing, immediate stop and Fault state. Counter M_DoseCount tracks number of doses. E-Stop I_EStop halts all. Program: ChemDosing

name: Batch Reactor Sequence
description: Batch reactor with 4 sequence steps: Fill via Q_InletValve until I_LevelHigh, Heat via Q_Heater until I_TempHigh, Mix via Q_AgitatorMotor for T_MixTime (600 seconds), Drain via Q_DrainValve until I_LevelLow. E-Stop I_EStop halts sequence at any step and forces Fault. Program: BatchReactor

name: Packaging Machine Counter
description: Packaging line conveyor Q_PackMotor runs and counts products via I_PartSensor rising edge. Batch size target 24 units. When M_BatchCount reaches 24, pulse Q_BatchReady for 2 seconds then reset counter. Reject sensor I_RejectSensor increments M_RejectCount. Jam I_JamSensor stops machine. Program: PackagingCtrl

name: Mixing Tank with Level and Temperature
description: Mixing tank control. Inlet valve Q_InletValve fills tank when I_LevelLow is active. Agitator Q_MixerMotor starts when I_LevelHigh reached. Temperature sensor I_TempHigh triggers heater cutoff. Outlet valve Q_OutletValve opens on I_Start after mixing complete T_MixDelay = 120 seconds. E-Stop I_EStop mandatory. Program: MixTankCtrl
